data.title: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP urges Varonis Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRNS) investors with substantial losses to reach out.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on December 4, 2025, the law firm Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is conducting an investigation concerning possible breaches of federal securities laws for investors of Varonis Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRNS). The investigation began on October 28, 2025. For more information, visit www.ktmc.com.

data.title: Kewaunee Scientific repays acquisition debt, completes successful refinancing in Statesville. (Characters: 99)
data.description: On December 4, 2025 in Statesville, North Carolina, Kewaunee Scientific Corporation (NASDAQ: KEQU), a prominent company in the field of designing, producing, and installing laboratory, healthcare, and technical furniture, shared news of its prosperous debt refinancing. The company has secured new financial agreements to address its debt and ensure stable operations moving forward.

data.title: Human Longevity increases cancer pledge to $1M to redefine colon cancer detection, prevention. Leader in precision health.
data.description: Human Longevity, Inc. (HLI), a prominent player in precision health and longevity medicine, unveiled an extension of its cancer pledge to encompass colon cancer, as part of its commitment to disease detection. The company, based in South San Francisco, Calif., stated this expansion to include the specific cancer type in their $1 million pledge aiming to further their mission in the medical field.

data.title: NatPay and Zebec partner for next-gen payroll with Web3, handling $170B annually for 300K ACH clients.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been formed between Payroll Growth Partners (PGP) of the Zebec Network and the National Payment Corporation (NatPay), a prominent ACH and document distribution provider. This collaboration aims to enhance the payroll and disbursement platform by incorporating bank-grade direct deposit infrastructure and introducing optional Web3 payout rails. NatPay, established in 1991, handles a significant volume, processing more than $170 billion annually for over 300,000 ACH clients. This aligns NatPay as one of the largest providers in the U.S. for such services.

data.title: Dell Technologies declares $0.525 quarterly cash dividend per share, up 18% annually to $2.10/share. Payable on Jan. 30, 2026.
data.description: Dell Technologies, a leading technology company based in Round Rock, Texas, recently announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.525 per common share. The dividend is set to be paid on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 20, 2026. This decision follows an 18% increase in the annual cash dividend to $2.10 per common share, approved by the board in February. Dell Technologies, traded on the NYSE under the symbol DELL, focuses on assisting organizations and individuals in shaping their digital futures.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund to distribute $0.10 per unit in Dec 2025. Record date: Dec 22, 2025; payment date: Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on December 4, 2025, Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) disclosed a monthly distribution for December 2025 at $0.10 per unit. Those recorded as unitholders by December 22, 2025, are set to receive payouts on January 15, 2026.
Federal Reserve Board requests public input on the impact of potential strategic changes to check services provided by the Fed, as well as check usage and preferences
Federal Reserve Board announces pricing, effective January 1, 2026, for payment services the Federal Reserve Banks provide to banks and credit unions

data.title: Fresh Del Monte was honored at the Rabobank Leadership Summit for driving responsible growth in food sector. NY, Dec 4th, 2025.
data.description: Global leaders in the food, agribusiness, and energy sectors are commending Rabobank for its groundbreaking initiatives driving sustainable growth. On December 4, 2025, in New York, Rabobank, a leading cooperative bank with global prominence in financing these industries, disclosed their latest achievements. With a strong focus on responsible practices, Rabobank is making significant strides in shaping the future of sustainable development.

data.title: Buster + Punch and GROHE SPA reveal bathroom collection at WAF Miami, integrating fixtures, hardware, and lighting.
data.description: A new fully integrated bathroom collection was revealed by Buster + Punch and GROHE SPA at the World Architecture Festival (WAF) in Miami on December 4, 2025. This collaboration combines plumbing fixtures, hardware, and lighting in a cohesive manner, providing architects with a holistic design solution. This innovative collection aims to enhance the bathroom experience by merging functionality and style.

data.title: IDEX Corp names Sean Gillen SVP, CFO, starting Jan 5, 2026.
data.description: IDEX Corporation, based in Northbrook, Illinois, has appointed Sean M. Gillen as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, starting on January 5, 2026.

data.title: Ulta Beauty beats Q3 earnings expectations: $5.14 per share (13.27% higher) and $2.858 billion revenue (up from $2.53 billion).
data.description: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ: ULTA) saw its stock rise in after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of its Q3 earnings report. The company outperformed expectations on both revenue and earnings. Ulta reported quarterly earnings of $5.14 per share, surpassing analyst estimates by 13.27%, which had projected earnings of $4.54 per share. The quarterly revenue stood at $2.858 billion, also exceeding the Street estimate of $2.72 billion. This represents an increase from the $2.53 billion in revenue reported in the same period last year. For more information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Costco nominates Gina Raimondo, former Secretary of Commerce and Governor, to its Board of Directors.
data.description: Issaquah-based retailer Costco Wholesale Corporation revealed the nomination of Secretary Gina Raimondo to its Board of Directors. Raimondo, previously the 40th Secretary of Commerce from 2021 to 2025 and Governor of Rhode Island between 2015 and 2021, began her political career as the Treasurer of the State of Rhode Island in 2010. Before venturing into politics, Secretary Raimondo had a background in venture capital and currently serves as a distinguished fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations. With her rich political and professional experience, she is set to join Costco's Board of Directors.

data.title: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP is investigating potential violations of federal securities laws for uniQure N.V. Investors.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in Radnor, Pennsylvania, Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP announced an ongoing probe into potential breaches of federal securities regulations for investors of uniQure N.V. (NASDAQ: QURE). The investigation follows uniQure's November 3, 2025, disclosure. For more details, visit ktmc.com.
Chinese drone maker DJI urges Trump administration to complete audit or extend deadline for security review - letter to Congress.

data.title: FreightCar America to attend Sidoti Virtual Conference on Dec. 11, 2025. CEO and CFO will participate in one-on-one investor meetings. Contact RAILIR@riveron.com for more info. Company is a leading manufacturer and supplier of railroad freight cars, railcar parts, and components, based in Chicago since 1901. Visit www.freightcaramerica.com for details.
data.description: FreightCar America, Inc. announced participation in Sidoti's Year End Virtual Investor Conference on December 11, 2025. The CEO and CFO will engage in one-on-one meetings with investors. FreightCar America, based in Chicago, specializes in designing, producing, and supplying railroad freight cars, parts, and components, as well as offering repair, rebody, and conversion services. The company, established in 1901, plays a vital role in the North American supply chain. For more information or to schedule a meeting, contact their Investor Relations team at RAILIR@riveron.com. Visit www.freightcaramerica.com for details.

data.title: Luxury townhome community Rivercrest coming soon to Reno, NV near Truckee River with Riverwalk District.
data.description: Rivercrest is set to introduce upscale townhomes in an exclusive area adjacent to the Truckee River and Riverwalk District. These luxury residences will provide exceptional living spaces for those who value both elegance and convenience.

data.title: SentinelOne's Q3 revenue hit $258.91 million, beating $257.7M consensus. Stock slips as guidance falls short.
data.description: SentinelOne Inc (NYSE: S) recently released their third-quarter financial results, with revenue reaching $258.91 million, surpassing the predicted $257.7 million. The company's adjusted earnings for the quarter were 7 cents per share, outperforming the anticipated 5 cents per share. Their total revenue experienced a 23% year-over-year growth. Additionally, the Annualized Recurring Revenue (ARR) also saw an increase. SentinelOne stock is currently exhibiting a downward trend. Traders are advised to keep an eye on various factors while dealing with S. This information can be found in detail on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Early cold snap hits Northeast, New Jersey American Water advises customers to protect pipes to prevent repairs.
data.description: In Camden, New Jersey, on December 4, 2025, an early onset of frigid temperatures has hit the Northeast region. New Jersey American Water is advising its customers to safeguard their plumbing to prevent expensive damages. It is crucial to take precautionary measures to protect pipes from freezing as temperatures drop rapidly.Residents should act promptly to avert potential issues and the need for costly repairs due to the severe weather conditions.
